It was our last night that we break up. I see your tail lights in the dust. You call your mama, I call your bluff. In the middle of the night, pull it right back up. Yeah, my, my friends say, "Let her go". Your friends say, "What the hell?" I wouldn't trade your kind of love for nothing else. Oh, baby, last night we let the liquor talk. I can't remember everything we said.
